name: IoT & Digital Twin Solutions
description: Connected industry solutions leveraging Deutsche Telekom's IoT connectivity, edge computing, and digital twin platforms. Covers industrial IoT use cases including predictive maintenance, asset tracking, smart factory, and connected vehicle scenarios.
positioning: End-to-end IoT stack from connectivity (Telekom SIM/eSIM) through edge processing to cloud analytics. Unique carrier-plus-IT integration that pure IT players cannot replicate.
competitive_moat: Telekom IoT connectivity, edge-to-cloud integration, automotive industry relationships
strategic_risk: IoT market fragmentation; many PoCs fail to reach production scale
